race.description: Jb Civil Concreting Country Boosted Maiden Plate
race.comment: VOYNICHESE (11) is a two-year-old filly on debut from the smart Nick Olive stable. By Pinatubo from Great Mystery. Proved too sharp in a recent Sapphire Coast trial. Will pay to see what the market does with her, though expecting her to make a bright start. SMOKIN' GENIE (9) improved sharply second-up when chasing gamely into third over this journey at Wellington. Kept on the fresh side with 32 days between runs and is expected to improve further third-up. Has had plenty of attempts to break through but this looks her best chance yet. PROPHET'S LASS (6) was poised to strike on debut at Dubbo nine days ago but just lacked the killer instinct. Is sure to have come on with that run under her belt and jumps from another good draw. Won't be a maiden for long. SHEZA RISK (7) is a three-year-old filly on debut from the stable of Scott Collings. By King Of Comedy from Shezatoucha. Comes here off a solid Goulburn trial and any push in betting should be respected.
